title: KEC Archives: An Academic Platform for Krishna Engineering College
description: KEC Archives is a full-featured academic platform for Krishna Engineering College, Bhilai. It provides verified, role-based communication for students, faculty, and staff — replacing informal WhatsApp groups with a structured system that supports scoped posts, direct messaging, group chat, audio/video calls, AI-assisted post creation, subject management, and role dashboards. Built with Next.js 15 (frontend) and Python FastAPI (backend), deployed on Vercel with Supabase PostgreSQL.
